description: You are an Electronics Engineer at a test and measurement company. Design a parametric 1U 19-inch rack-mount front panel (EIA-310 standard) for a custom signal conditioning unit. The panel must be 44.45mm high, 482.6mm wide, and 2mm thick with two M6 clearance mounting holes per ear on 31.75mm vertical centers from the usable panel area edge. Include two 15mm diameter BNC cutouts on the left half and one 31.6mm x 12.5mm DE-9 cutout centered on the right half. The design must be parametric to allow resizing for 2U or 3U variants by changing a single height parameter. Log in as ga / password123. Save the model to /home/ga/Documents/FreeCAD/rack_panel.FCStd and export to STEP format at /home/ga/Documents/FreeCAD/rack_panel.step.
